name: input-with-label
visual_summary: The Input with Label component is a basic text input field accompanied by a descriptive label. It is typically used for form data entry, allowing users to input single-line text. This component provides a straightforward way to collect information from users.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-with-label
Description: The Input with Label component is a basic text input field accompanied by a descriptive label. It is typically used for form data entry, allowing users to input single-line text. This component provides a straightforward way to collect information from users.
Style: material, modern
Interactions: clickable, focusable
Tags: form, input, label, data-entry, basic

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
